title: protium polybotryum subsp. blackii
intro: Protium polybotryum subsp. blackii, also known as Protium Blackii, is a species of flowering plant in the family Burseraceae. It is a type of tree native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The medicinal properties of Protium Blackii include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Protium Blackii include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and aid in the treatment of respiratory problems, and it is often prepared as an herbal tea or tincture for its medicinal uses.
